scripts.static-check: yarn workspace battleforthecrown-backend type-check && yarn workspace battleforthecrown-pixi type-check && yarn workspace battleforthecrown-backend lint:check && yarn workspace battleforthecrown-pixi lint:check
scripts.test: yarn test:backend && yarn test:pixi && yarn test:smoke
scripts.dev:
echo '
  ▶ Frontend  http://localhost:5173
  ▶ Backend   http://localhost:15001
' && concurrently -n front,back -c magenta,blue -k "cd battleforthecrown-pixi && exec node_modules/.bin/vite --port 5173 --strictPort" "cd battleforthecrown-backend && PORT=15001 exec node_modules/.bin/nest start --watch"
